title: Principle II Asymmetry: Alpha vs Beta/Gamma

content.finding: Principle II (adaptation inseparable from computation) satisfied for alpha, NOT for beta/gamma
content.evidence: Alpha adapts via per-cell resp_z (intrinsic). Beta/gamma require global MI measurement (extrinsic)
implications: LOCAL vs GLOBAL adaptation asymmetry is the central bottleneck
Alpha and beta/gamma require different adaptation mechanisms
